title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE M'LANG DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF M'LANG, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO FIFTY (50) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 4038 / 88 OG No. 13, 1734 (Mar. 30, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7200, February 25, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE M'LANG DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF M'LANG, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO FIFTY (50) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the M'lang District Hospital in the Municipality of M'lang, Province of Cotabato, is hereby increased from twenty-five (25) to fifty (50) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 16, 1991 and December 10, 1991, respectively.

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: February 25, 1992

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
